name: sandcastle-max
description: AFK Claude Code agents en Docker contra tu Claude Max subscription (vía CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, workaround para Sandcastle issue #191 wontfix). v0.6.0: stack-aware scaffold — el Dockerfile se compone per-project desde snippets (base + runtimes detectados de manifests/lockfiles + agent layer con UID surgery) en lugar de una imagen fija Node+Bun. Soporta .NET, Node, Bun, Python, Go, Ruby, Rust y polyglot (fat image). Orchestrator movido al plugin (runtime/), repo del usuario solo tiene .sandcastle/ — sin package.json contamination, sin scripts/. Slash commands: /sandcastle-init (detector + composer), /sandcastle-build, /sandcastle-run (NUEVOS — reemplazan bun run sandcastle:*), /sandcastle-dispatch-wave, /sandcastle-merge-wave, /sandcastle-pipeline. Generator fallback con WebFetch para stacks unknown (Elixir, Swift, etc.). Per-project image: sandcastle-<repo-basename>. Sin backward compat con v0.5.x.
